description: The Desire fragrance for men from dunhill is the essence of the charismatic, flamboyant cosmopolitan male. Showy yet classy, the notes on this fragrance are apple, orange blossoms, fresh, sweet bergamot and sparkling lemon. The heart brings notes of rose, patchouli and teakwood in. The base acts with the accords of vanilla, musk and labdanum.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
